heading: Step 1: Load the local .
body:
- Click the following button to download the Mistral 7B model
  from GPT4All. To explore other models, refer to the
  [GPT4All website](https://gpt4all.io/index.html).

  Download

- Move this model into your `local-rag-mongodb` project directory.

- Paste the following code in your notebook to configure the LLM (Large Language Model).
  Before running, replace `<path-to-model>` with
  the path where you saved the LLM locally.

  ```python
  from langchain.callbacks.streaming_stdout import StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler
  from langchain_community.llms import GPT4All

  # Configure the LLM
  local_path = "<path-to-model>"

  # Callbacks support token-wise streaming
  callbacks = [StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler()]

  # Verbose is required to pass to the callback manager
  llm = GPT4All(model=local_path, callbacks=callbacks, verbose=True)
  ```

codeBlocks.content:
from langchain.callbacks.streaming_stdout import StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler
from langchain_community.llms import GPT4All

# Configure the LLM
local_path = "<path-to-model>"

# Callbacks support token-wise streaming
callbacks = [StreamingStdOutCallbackHandler()]

# Verbose is required to pass to the callback manager
llm = GPT4All(model=local_path, callbacks=callbacks, verbose=True)
